creator: karels@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #25)

Is /usr/freebsd-dist ever installed?  I don't think so, it's just on the ISO images.

/usr/tests is optional, but the man page is probably installed in any case.

/boot/overlays sounds wrong; I don't see one of those.  I have /boot/msdos/overlays on an ARM, but that isn't really part of the standard hierarchy.
